have h₁ : n + 2 ≤ n + 4 := by
      -- Use the fact that 2 ≤ 4 to show that n + 2 ≤ n + 4
      have h₂ : 2 ≤ 4 := by norm_num
      -- Use the omega tactic to solve the linear arithmetic problem
      omega
    exact h₁
  
  exact h_main
